behaviors.behavior: Size proxy: oversize-file ratio over source files, strict > threshold, capped/deterministic, n/a when no source files
Dependency hygiene: lockfile->license via reused SBOM collectors; NOT_INSTALLED excluded from the graded set (honest); copyleft/unknown counted; n/a when nothing inspectable
JUnit hardened parse: DTD/XXE/billion-laughs rejected (defusedxml forbid_dtd), skipped excluded, leaf-suites not double-counted, tests=inf/huge degrades to 0 without aborting aggregation
gh runner: list-arg subprocess, 403/rate-limit/auth/not-found/timeout classification, GitHub owner/repo parse with slug validation (rejects ../odd chars)
Network policy: local-only default; --allow-network enriches a public remote; private/unverifiable auto-disabled unless --allow-network-private; provenance records what left the machine

Security signal: code-scanning SARIF (default-branch-filtered) -> open high/critical via reused suppression-aware parser + grade guard; invalid/non-list-runs/no-analyses/403/auth/local-only -> n/a, never a false clean
Test-health: 3 tiers (CI JUnit -> Scorecard statusCheckRollup -> static-inventory floor), best-available wins, tier stamped; 403/no-network degrades deterministically
signal_bundle maps the four signals onto GradeInputs kwargs + detail overrides + per-dimension provenance; n/a signals set nothing
report_model: provenance-override replaces source/disabled; network provenance fields carried; top-reasons rewritten to overridden detail (no two-wordings-for-one-control)
Renderers surface the network provenance line in both terminal + markdown, for enabled (enrichments) and local-only (note) states
CLI --allow-network / --allow-network-private flags; JSON carries network + maintainability; --allow-network without a remote stays local-only (no network attempted)
Reused compliance license collectors are read-only (no package-manager exec / writes) and the dependency signal writes nothing to the target
Projector wiring: network_enabled stamps verified_from; local-only default policy; G1 fixtures re-grade with maintainability now lit (no-tests D->C)
Live gh network round-trip against real GitHub repos (code-scanning analyses download, gh run download JUnit, GraphQL rollup)
